section_name: Motor must be shut off when supply tank being filled with fuel.
text: It shall be unlawful for the driver of any motor vehicle to leave the engine of the motor vehicle running while the supply tank of the vehicle is being filled with gasoline or other motor fuel.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.910 — Motor must be shut off when supply tank being filled with fuel.

It shall be unlawful for the driver of any motor vehicle to leave the engine of the motor vehicle running while the supply tank of the vehicle is being filled with gasoline or other motor fuel.

subsections.text: It shall be unlawful for the driver of any motor vehicle to leave the engine of the motor vehicle running while the supply tank of the vehicle is being filled with gasoline or other motor fuel.
